description_long: This house complex features a modern, low-rise architectural design with multiple interconnected rectangular structures surrounded by lush landscaping. The buildings are predominantly white with flat roofs, and the property is enclosed by a perimeter wall and lined with trees along the street. The central courtyard is filled with flowering trees and greenery, creating a tranquil communal space. Several driveways and parking areas are visible, with cars parked near the entrance. The windows are arranged in a mix of regular and irregular patterns, and the main entryway is accessible from the street, marked by a clear path and a gate. The overall layout suggests a multi-unit residential development with shared outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, low-rise residential complex with flat roofs, white facades, and a landscaped central courtyard, surrounded by trees and a perimeter wall.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the house complex with the main entrance, driveway, parking spaces, and a clear view of the landscaped courtyard and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the property, showcasing the depth of the landscaped courtyard and the arrangement of flowering trees, with less emphasis on the entrance.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the complex, focusing on the back facades of the buildings and the tree-lined boundary, with minimal visibility of the entrance or parking.
description_view_3: View 3 offers an angled perspective from the opposite side, showing the parking area, side entrance, and a broad view of the courtyard and building layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved path, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and a perimeter wall.
